text.message: Lwts be careful whit giving wheat so easy
how often have you convinced people with your crying?
Green is a road player with all recouces to city
Just please take that into consideration
really think greens the target here
fyi blue, two wood will sometimes be useful for me to port, but im rarely gonna be interested in just one
dont think i had what you wanted that time
but letting you know for future reference
i mean i never wanted to be ur enemy lol
y'all have slowed me down, or the dice did.
don't think I'm still the target
I hope it's not one of thsoe games where people don't realize that the target changed until it's too late
im watching to see who surges, dw
i would agree for the time being. but close game
nothing wrong with keeping an open mind to changes
I'm not really the road builder production wise
I'll fight for it if that's what the table needs
no real wood source and no port
can trade you a road red
think ur the road guy blue
ok anyone want to feed me road
Should leave army here for oj
sorry im much closer to army. that's the choice im making
U make a lot of bad choices
i hear you, but this is my choice
so im happy to trade road mats, but if i cant trade i will port
And then judging whom to block and rob
i can give ore for roads
And i need to port sheep for wood
ur not getting a better deal on ur turn
no one heard of working together when behind
one for one just didnt help me, im sorry
i offered this on my turn
dont be spiteful give the road
I told u why i need 2
and then you went on to ask for 1
have brick if it helps you recover road
I need wood. Iike I told you I would
Cant win here just like that
Wont be able to fight road that much
the timing of it all is certainly tricky
safer for others if road is with me. Road would put me at 8. puts you at 9
no one should be helping you keep it
trading blue is very risky here
trading blue brick is not very risky lol
and there is no world in which taht was possibly the win even if i was on 9
i have wood for you green
you keep talking like you know my devs lol
haven't been right about a single one so far
I was rigt all this time for now
you have been wrong every single time you've guessed my devs :)
so much crying from a winner
